title: Techtoby Corp
description: A collection of apps for Bloxburg builders, designed by dummtoby.

apps.name: floorplanner
apps.description: Draw 2D top-down floor plans of your builds with walls, doors, windows, roofs and furniture across multiple floors!
apps.author: dummtoby

apps.name: bbcomputer
apps.description: Design nice computer desktop decals for your Bloxburg builds!
apps.author: dummtoby

apps.name: bbfamtree
apps.description: Generate a family tree for your Bloxburg builds!
apps.author: dummtoby

apps.name: bbmural
apps.description: Generate a mural for your Bloxburg builds!
apps.author: dummtoby

apps.name: bbbusinessman
apps.description: Manage your Bloxburg businesses with permission trees and salary generation!
apps.author: dummtoby

apps.name: bbwhiteboard
apps.description: Create handwritten whiteboard decals for your Bloxburg builds!
apps.author: dummtoby

apps.name: bsecsign
apps.description: Turn text or an image into a buildable shape chart of rectangles and wedges for 3D Bloxburg signs!
apps.author: dummtoby

apps.name: settings
apps.description: Manage profiles, import/export data, and configure site settings.
apps.author: dummtoby
